homeTitle: Cagey — Free Daily Cage Puzzle Game
homeDesc: A free daily math puzzle game. Fill cages with numbers so they hit the target using +, ×, −, ÷. Progressive KenKen-style rules — row/col uniqueness at higher levels. New puzzle every day.
dailyDesc: Solve today's daily cage puzzle #{num}. Fill cages with numbers using +, ×, −, ÷ to hit each target. Free, no download needed.
practiceDesc: Practice cage puzzles at {difficulty} level. Puzzle #{num} — fill cages with numbers to hit each target. Free online math puzzle.
archiveDesc: Browse all past Cagey daily cage puzzles. Play any puzzle you missed. Free online math puzzle game.
howToPlayTitle: How to Play Cagey — Cage Puzzle Rules & Strategy
howToPlayDesc: Learn how to solve Cagey cage puzzles. Step-by-step rules, strategies, and tips for all difficulty levels. Free online math puzzle game.
challengeDesc: Solve this cage puzzle with limited number inventory! Each digit has a fixed supply. {difficulty} level, puzzle #{num}. Free online math puzzle.
404Desc: This puzzle doesn't exist yet. Play today's daily puzzle or browse the archive.
